description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a duck with a streamlined, elongated body and a slightly curved neck. The plumage is primarily a muted brownish-gray with subtle variations and lighter patches, especially on the underside and near the tail. The head is rounded with a short, slightly pointed beak, and the wings are tucked closely to the body, blending smoothly into the overall form. The tail feathers are short and slightly fanned, with a hint of white visible at the rear. The surface texture appears matte and slightly rough, mimicking the look of natural feathers. The overall proportions and details suggest a wild duck species commonly found in urban parks and waterways.
description: A lifelike brown-gray duck with a streamlined body, rounded head, and subtle feather details. The surface is matte and slightly rough, resembling natural plumage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the duck's body, neck, and beak, with feather texture and subtle color variations visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded tail, fanned feathers, and the symmetry of the body and wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the duck's profile and the gentle curve of the neck.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, beak, and the width of the chest, with both eyes and the bill visible.
